texto: You and I both know, deep in your heart, you agree with me. And I will prove it with one hypothetical scenario: you are alone in a closet of your home. There`s a bright red button. You can push that button and presto all Negroes and Jews and all other colored people are instantly removed from the North American continent and returned to their native countries.You`d push it, wouldn`t you whitey?See? See? See? in the final analysis, you agree with me.But of course, you wouldn`t do antything to bring that scenario about, or any other scenario favorable to your Race.
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de Frazier Glenn Miller que provoca vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. Ao questionar “You and I both know, deep in your heart, you agree with me. And I will prove it with one hypothet…”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre amor, cowardice, hidden-racism, com foco em hidden-racism e hypocracy.

texto: I spent much of my prison time reading. I must have read over 200 large books, mostly fictional stories about the American pioneers, the Vikings, Mafia, etc. As long as I was engrossed in a book, I was not in prison. Reading was my escape.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Frazier Glenn Miller sobre passagem do tempo e prioridades. A afirmação “I spent much of my prison time reading. I must have read over 200 large books, mostly fictional s…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a tempo, bibliophile, books, útil em momentos de books e jail.

texto: You don`t have to do anything. Why worry? It`s all god`s plan anyway. Just love everyone and believe. Be a limp-wristed wimp and recruit others to be the same. But, give unto Caesar that which is Caesar`s. When Caesar says drop bombs on christian babies in Berlin, or Muslim babies in Iraq, it`s okay. When Caesar says open your borders to tens of millions of dark immigrants, or to bus your children to jungle neighborhoods, or to accept legalized pornography an the abortion murder of babies, then it is Caesar`s responsibility, not the Christian`s. So don`t concern yourselves.

But, give unto Caesar that which is Caesar`s. When Caesar says drop bombs on christian babies in Berlin, or Muslim babies in Iraq, it`s okay. When Caesar says open your borders to tens of millions of dark immigrants, or to bus your children to jungle neighborhoods, or to accept legalized pornography an the abortion murder of babies, then it is Caesar`s responsibility, not the Christian`s. So don`t concern yourselves.

texto: At around 6:00 a.m., April 30, 1987, we were awakened by a loud bull horn while inside our rented mobile home at an Ozark, Missouri trailer park."Glenn Miller, Jack Jackson, Douglas Sheets, Tony Wydra, this is a United States Marshal. You have three minutes to come out with your hands up, or we will commence firing."The feds had flown in two SWAT teams; one from Kentucky, the other from Louisiana (40 in all, plus the Marshals and local authorities) to make the arrests.We were surrounded.I had a hang-over, couldn't find my pants, and had to pee, bad.
explicacao: Citação de Frazier Glenn Miller sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “At around 6:00 a.m., April 30, 1987, we were awakened by a loud bull horn while inside our rented…” articula reflexao, humorous-quotes, around em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
